creator: lwhsu@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Craig Leres from comment #7)
Hi, this patch should make security/fprintd able to be built on 14:

https://github.com/lwhsu/freebsd-ports/commit/dc204ccf2d105d4df6b2e79766a14013046da510#diff-0c893a3af1e4e0b2b633375c6be451d674af3da89234ae63b7fb6e7cde335832

I will push it after more testing.
